strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js product work at re:cinq, Optilyz, and RIDE, exceeding the 6+ year requirement
Hands-on AI agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — a rare explicitly-required skill
Strong testing culture: TDD/CI/CD practice at RIDE, author of test libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and taught testing workshops
concerns: No Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere on the résumé, despite it being in the primary stack
React exposure appears limited to one role (Optilyz); most frontend history is Ember.js
No Kotlin and no explicit Vitest/Jest/Playwright usage cited; secondary-stack coverage rests on older Java work at Altom

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and limited React/Kotlin evidence

response.justification: The role's core competencies are TypeScript/Node fullstack delivery, React, Nest.js, testing expertise, cloud/containers, databases, and AI agent development. The candidate shows strong evidence on most: TS/Node/React/MongoDB/AWS CDK at Optilyz, Node/TS/GraphQL with TDD and trunk-based development at RIDE, Kubernetes/Docker via GISCollective and Altom dev-ops work, and current AI-agent/MCP tooling at re:cinq directly matching the AI agent requirement. Testing expertise is evidenced by authored test frameworks and TDD practice, though the specific tools (Vitest, Playwright) are not named. Gaps are Nest.js (absent), Kotlin (absent), and comparatively thin React history relative to Ember. Given the breadth of matched competencies and only framework-level gaps that a senior engineer with this profile can close quickly, the evidence supports a strong recommendation.
